rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or declared as helpers in the same annex.
Resolve type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with the types of their expressions.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must use only visible AADL features or helpers declared in the same annex.
Type consistency is required for all AGREE expressions and declarations.
Validator diagnostics pointing to type errors should be resolved by correcting root causes, not by adding new architecture.
AGREE annexes must be placed in valid component type or implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Helper declarations must match the type of their assigned expressions.
Use only scalar types int, real, and bool in AGREE declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers that are not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not attempt to resolve type errors by adding new architecture elements outside the current scope.
